metrics.time_saving_focus: Use this engine to automate the dominant, time-consuming 95-99% of repeated analysis, screening, packaging, and optimization workflows. Keep the residual 1-5% under licensed engineer review, legacy-tool cross-check, and formal sign-off workflows.

residual_holdout_buckets.label: Licensed Engineer Review
residual_holdout_buckets.scope: non-standard interpretation, final judgment, exceptional irregularity, and member-level edge cases

residual_holdout_buckets.label: Legacy Tool Cross-Validation
residual_holdout_buckets.scope: novel load paths, authority-critical submodels, and residual niche workflows outside the accelerated envelope

residual_holdout_buckets.label: Legal Sign-Off
residual_holdout_buckets.scope: formal seal, legal submission, and authority-facing responsibility that remains outside automated scope

residual_holdout_detail_rows.why: Top story-zone review pockets are derived from actual accepted design-change rows so engineer holdout stays tied to the highest-touch parts of the structure.
High-touch story bands remain under engineer review because they concentrate accepted design changes and irregular response checks.
Dominant member families in accepted optimization changes still require engineer judgment on local edge cases and detailing intent.
Zone concentration is used to focus manual review on the highest-touch portions of the structural layout.
Authority submodel families are derived from the active catalog paths so cross-validation follows the exact benchmark submodels still outside the accelerated envelope.
Authority-critical benchmark tracks remain the primary cross-validation target outside the accelerated envelope.

residual_holdout_detail_rows.detail_value: SAC20_LA_holdout_01, SAC20_SEA_holdout_02, SAC20_BOS_holdout_03, NHERI_UCSD_like_holdout_01, NHERI_UCSD_like_holdout_02, NHERI_UCSD_like_holdout_03
residual_holdout_detail_rows.why: Authority catalog case ids are read directly so the holdout review list refreshes automatically when the benchmark catalog changes.
Formal authority-facing responsibility is anchored to the active authority catalog tracks and remains outside the automated responsibility boundary.

residual_holdout_detail_rows.detail_value: sealed submission pack, authority-facing variants, stamped final issue
residual_holdout_detail_rows.why: Formal authority-facing deliverables remain outside the automated responsibility boundary.

residual_holdout_matrix_rows.why: Routing matrix links active authority submodels to dominant story/zone/member-family review pockets so the remaining manual and legacy-tool work stays explicit.
